official_title: Courts Order No. 3 of 2017 in Respect of The DIFC Courts Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Member of the Small Claims Tribunal of the DIFC Courts APRIL 13, 2017 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS Order No. 3 of 2017 in Respect of The DIFC Courts Small DIFC Courts (/glossary/DIFC-courts/) Claims – Additional Member of the Small Claims Tribunal of the DIFCTribunal (/glossary/tribunal/) Courts I, Michael Hwang, of the Dubai International FinancialChief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) Centre , Courts (/glossary/court/) Having reviewed— Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the ;DIFC (/glossary/DIFC/) Dubai Law No. 12 Of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC; DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 establishing the Small Claims Tribunal (“SCT”); DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2010 – Limits of ; Jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/) DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2014 – Members of the SCT; DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2016 – Additional Members of the SCT; DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2016 – Additional Members of the SCT; Practice Direction No. 2 of 2010 – SCT ; andJudge (/glossary/judge/) Part 53 of the of the DIFC CourtsRules (/glossary/rules/) And Whereas – 1.The DIFC Courts Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, where he considers it appropriate, to set up and administer Tribunals of the DIFC Courts, and to authorise for their administration, which shall be set out in the Rules of rules (/glossary/rules/) (Article 14(3)). Court (/glossary/court/)

Courts Order No. 3 of 2017 in Respect of The DIFC Courts Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Member of the Small Claims Tribunal of the DIFC Courts APRIL 13, 2017 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS Order No. 3 of 2017 in Respect of The DIFC Courts Small DIFC Courts (/glossary/DIFC-courts/) Claims – Additional Member of the Small Claims Tribunal of the DIFCTribunal (/glossary/tribunal/) Courts I, Michael Hwang, of the Dubai International FinancialChief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) Centre , Courts (/glossary/court/) Having reviewed— Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the ;DIFC (/glossary/DIFC/) Dubai Law No. 12 Of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC; DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 establishing the Small Claims Tribunal (“SCT”); DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2010 – Limits of ; Jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/) DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2014 – Members of the SCT; DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2016 – Additional Members of the SCT; DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2016 – Additional Members of the SCT; Practice Direction No. 2 of 2010 – SCT ; andJudge (/glossary/judge/) Part 53 of the of the DIFC CourtsRules (/glossary/rules/) And Whereas – 1.The DIFC Courts Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, where he considers it appropriate, to set up and administer Tribunals of the DIFC Courts, and to authorise for their administration, which shall be set out in the Rules of rules (/glossary/rules/) (Article 14(3)). Article 2.heading: This Order shall take effect from the date of signature. Order No. 2 of 2007 shall remain in full force and effect save as amended by this Order. This Order shall be known as The DIFC Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Members of the SCT Order No. 2 of 2017

Article 3.heading: The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”) contain at Part 53 the rules relating to the SCT; and

Article 4.heading: The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for the prompt and cost-effi cient hearing and determination of smaller claims within the of the DIFC Courts. jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)

The SCT was established pursuant to DIFC.heading: The SCT was established pursuant to DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 issued by the then Chief Justice, Sir Anthony Evans

The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”).heading: The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”) contain at Part 53 the rules relating to the SCT; and

The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for.heading: The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for the prompt and cost-effi cient hearing and determination of smaller claims within the of the DIFC Courts. jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)

This Order shall take effect from the da.heading: This Order shall take effect from the date of signature. Order No. 2 of 2007 shall remain in full force and effect save as amended by this Order. This Order shall be known as The DIFC Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Members of the SCT Order No. 2 of 2017
